summary: Completed comprehensive testing of CryptoVault authentication, wallet, alerts, and frontend functionality. Backend APIs mostly functional with NOWPayments in mock mode. Frontend authentication context has integration issues preventing dashboard access.

critical_bugs.issue: Returns 500 'Invalid api key' error when creating deposits
critical_bugs.impact: Blocks deposit functionality - NOWPayments API key is placeholder

ui_bugs.issue: Dashboard stuck on loading screen due to 401 authentication errors

integration_issues.issue: Persistent 401 errors for /api/auth/me and /api/auth/refresh preventing dashboard access
Browser not properly handling HttpOnly cookies for authentication

design_issues.issue: Loading screen shows on all pages instead of actual content

passed_tests: Alerts CRUD operations (create, read, update, delete)
React Router v7 future flags (no warnings)
Frontend page navigation (Markets, Trade, Learn, Contact)
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix authentication context integration - 401 errors preventing dashboard access. The backend authentication works but frontend can't maintain session. Also configure NOWPayments API key or ensure mock mode works properly.
